name: Sealwalker's Pendant
description: Carved from the Deepwalker's shed tooth. Script on surface readable only by Kerra. Warms when held near an unrecognized Witness.
effect: Pass between companions in populated areas — it will find who it's looking for.

name: The Impossible Flower
description: Pressed between glass, sealed with wax. Grows only below, near the Verath Ohn chamber. Pulled up in a fishing net years ago.
effect: Heals damage that cannot otherwise be healed. One use, then gone.
notes: Keep until absolutely certain.

name: The Glass Sphere
description: Left by the Observatory presence in Mast's locked chest. Finds things that actively avoid observation, but only through peripheral vision.
effect: Reveals things that avoid observation — peripheral vision only.
notes: Lenn has already developed an intuitive relationship with it.

name: The Measuring Rods
description: Cuppin Tevoulle's instrument. Measures something called presence depth.
effect: Bearing consistently northeast — toward the Eldest's valley.
notes: Jaygar developing intuition for them without fully understanding them.

name: Mast's Research Documents
description: Eleven years of boundary work. Chamber locations including four previously unknown, approach maps for the north, correspondence connecting Calvane to Argentveil operations.
effect: Intelligence asset. Four new chamber locations.
notes: Lyria has reviewed.

name: Third Orvath Account Documents
description: Found in Mast's research. A third Syndicate account in Orvath beyond the two Thorne disclosed. Different account structure, different access method.
effect: Unknown — needs investigation.
notes: Different from the Thorne accounts. Access method not yet determined.

name: Ring of Necrotic Resistance
description: Simple ring.
effect: Resistance to necrotic damage while attuned.

name: Hendvar's Enchanting Tools
description: Portable enchanting station — a toolkit rather than a fixed station.

name: Laboratory Diagram
description: Self-sustaining power source research.

name: First Breath Vial
description: Unknown purpose.
effect: Unknown.
notes: Handle carefully.

name: Hendvar's Spellbook (Lenn's copy)
description: Hendvar's personal spellbook. Shared with Lyria for spell extraction.
effect: Spell extraction.

name: Hendvar's Spellbook (Lyria's copy)
description: Hendvar's personal spellbook. Shared with Lenn for spell extraction.
effect: Spell extraction.

name: Lyria's Contract
description: Lyria keeps this.

name: Whetstone of Keen Edge
description: Sharpening whetstone.
effect: 1/rest.

name: Everlasting Blue Candles
description: Candles that do not burn down.

name: Regional Maps
description: Northern Reaches and campaign region.
effect: Valuable for northern campaign.

name: Necrotic Essence Containers
description: Sealed necrotic essence containers.
effect: Unknown.
notes: Left in Millhaven. Find a responsible institution when relevant. Do not open.

name: Seal Compass
description: Small circular compass-shaped object with 8 points, each filled with a kind of vapor.
effect: Allows perceptualization of all eight seals across the continent and remote tending. Quality of remote tending is meaningful but not equivalent to physical presence.

name: Boots of the Tireless North
description: Soft leather, northern make, clan stitching along the ankle. Worn looking but perfectly preserved. Sized for small feet.
effect: No movement penalties in difficult terrain (snow, ice, mud, rubble). Travel pace never causes exhaustion regardless of distance covered in a day.

name: Northern Recurve Bow
description: Compact recurve hunting bow, northern construction. Viable from horseback or tight terrain. Luminescent bowstring, pulls smooth and silent.
effect: Three accompanying arrows of dark dense northern metal (same as the elder's axe). Arrows return to quiver after a successful hit only — not after a miss.
notes: Siv recognized immediately it wasn't for her. Vrethka's spear now feels transitional rather than permanent.

name: True Journal
description: Blank pages — cannot be written in deliberately. Cover worked with a pattern Kerra read immediately without being asked.
effect: Records automatically whatever the bearer witnesses that is genuinely true — not believed to be true, actually true. Only truth gets in.
notes: No one else in the party has processed what this means for someone with Kerra's history, her patron, and her years of reading things she shouldn't.

name: Blackwood Wand Focus
description: Blackwood wand usable as a spellcasting focus.
effect: +1 to spell attack rolls and spell save DC.

name: Helm of Brilliance Buckle
description: Chinstrap buckle from a Helm of Brilliance.
effect: Can be reconstructed into a functional Helm of Brilliance with the right smith.

name: Fabrication Project — Missing Components
description: Outstanding sourcing requirement to complete dismantling of a 40-year-old self-sustaining magical automation system.
effect: 60% of required tools already in hand. Missing: copper grounding coil (minimum 18 inches), two ceramic insulating brackets, one resonance dampener.
notes: None of these are exotic. Sourceable in any city with a decent artificer supply or engineering merchant. Argentveil or Khemrise most likely.

name: Sending Stones — Vaz / Tielle
description: Paired sending stones.
effect: Cast Sending between holders once per day.

name: Sending Stones — Vaz / Vrethka
description: Paired sending stones.
effect: Cast Sending between holders once per day.

name: Sending Stones — Vaz / Kern
description: Paired sending stones.
effect: Cast Sending between holders once per day.

name: Sending Stones — Tielle / Marcus
description: Paired sending stones.
effect: Cast Sending between holders once per day.

name: Sending Stones — Tielle / Ledwent
description: Paired sending stones.
effect: Cast Sending between holders once per day.

name: Sending Stones — Tielle / Gaelestrasz
description: Paired sending stones.
effect: Cast Sending between holders once per day.

name: Sending Stones — Tielle / Casvath
description: Paired sending stones.
effect: Cast Sending between holders once per day.

name: Sending Stones — Tielle / Coalbeard
description: Paired sending stones.
effect: Cast Sending between holders once per day.

name: Sending Stones — Tielle / Harwick
description: Paired sending stones.
effect: Cast Sending between holders once per day.

name: Sending Stones — Unpaired (x2)
description: Two unpaired short-distance sending stones.
effect: Short distance only. No paired counterpart yet.

name: Short-Distance Mirror Set
description: Paired mirrors for short-distance communication.
effect: Visual communication only — no audio.

name: Veilstrike Rapier +2
notes: Main hand. +9 to hit, 1d8+7 damage.

name: Echo Dagger +2
notes: Off-hand. +9 to hit, 1d4+7 damage.

name: Warden Dagger
notes: Boot dagger. +1 to attack and damage vs fiends and aberrations.

name: Hand Crossbow +2
notes: Primary ranged option.

name: Wyvern Scale Coat +1
notes: Medium armor. AC 14 base + DEX (max 2) + 1.

name: Bracer of Swift Strikes
notes: Reaction: off-hand attack on main hand hit. Frees bonus action.

name: Stone Disc
notes: Witness item. Perceives concealment — sees what is hidden.

name: The Book
notes: Witness texts. Still being read.

name: Berserker's Fang +1
notes: Greataxe. 1d12+7 while raging (STR mod + rage bonus + magic).

name: Bracers of Defense
notes: +2 AC when not wearing armor or using a shield.

name: Bracers of Defense
notes: +2 AC when not wearing armor or using a shield.

name: Ring of Protection +1
notes: +1 AC and saving throws.

name: Cloak of Displacement
notes: Attackers have disadvantage until she takes damage each round.

name: Paired Shortsword
notes: Main hand. Resonance with Pirra's paired shortsword — both gain advantage on first attack each round when within 30ft of each other.

name: Paired Shortsword
notes: Main hand. Resonance with Pirra's paired shortsword — both gain advantage on first attack each round when within 30ft of each other.

name: Dagger of Swift Strike +1
effect: Once per turn on a hit: immediately make a second strike with this dagger as part of the same attack, without using a bonus action.
flavor: The iridescence pulses faintly when it connects — like something eager being satisfied.
notes: Named privately. Hasn't told anyone.

name: Ring of Watchful Eye
notes: +1 Perception, Darkvision, Detect Magic 1/day.

name: Boots of Elvenkind
notes: Advantage on Stealth checks to move silently.

name: Boots of Elvenkind
notes: Advantage on Stealth checks to move silently.

name: Gloves of Thievery
notes: +5 to Sleight of Hand and to pick locks.

name: Ring of Stilled Breath
notes: Severin's effects. Non-Witness item.

name: Obsidian Stone
notes: Witness item. Shows all exits and entrances simultaneously.

name: Alchemical Dagger
notes: Passive: proficiency extension on alchemical checks, substance detection on touch.

name: Magical Aura Detector
notes: 30ft range.

name: Amulet of Health
notes: Sets CON to 19.

name: Dark Lens
notes: Witness item. Sees through fabrication — constructed falsehoods show their true structure.

name: Warding Vambrace
notes: Reaction 1/day: reduce incoming damage by 1d10+3.

name: Pearl of Power
notes: Recover one expended spell slot up to 3rd level. 1/day.

name: Silvered Shortsword
notes: Backup. +1 to attack and damage vs fiends and lycanthropes (silvered).

name: Silvered Shortsword
notes: Backup. +1 to attack and damage vs fiends and lycanthropes (silvered).

name: Hourglass
notes: Witness item. Affects time perception or probability — still being processed.

name: Frost Shortsword +1
notes: Frost-touched damage.

name: Mithral Chain Shirt
notes: Backup. No stealth disadvantage.

name: Enchanted Mace
notes: Command word: Calm Light — penetrates magical darkness. Sanctuary Trigger 1/day as bonus action without expending a spell slot. Named by Petra.

name: Bracers +1 AC
notes: +1 to AC.

name: Abyssal Hide Leather Armor
notes: Incoming — from Calla Denn. Not yet received.

name: Longsword +2
notes: Pact weapon.

name: Gauntlet
notes: Witness item. Completes the pact begun three years ago in the Millhaven mines. Different in nature from all other Witness items.

name: Whisper Longbow +2
notes: +10 to hit, 1d8+6 damage. Two attacks.

name: Short Sword
notes: Backup melee.

name: Bracers of Archery
notes: +2 damage on ranged attacks with longbows and shortbows.

name: Bracers of Archery
notes: +2 damage on ranged attacks with longbows and shortbows.

name: Rapier
notes: Backup.

name: Headband of Intellect
notes: Sets INT to 19.

name: Plain Band Ring
notes: Witness item. Remembers every voice ever heard.

name: Cloak of Protection
notes: +1 to AC and saving throws.

name: Sealwalker's Cloak
notes: The item. Movement between chambers requires Vrethka's intention and below's participation. Action to concentrate on a known chamber — the below parts the boundary and the company passes through. Short rest to reuse. Carries companions holding her in a connected line. Maximum companions: WIS modifier (5). Party members with active Witness items are anchored; uncertain travelers risk disorientation.

name: Carved Bone Totem
notes: Spellcasting focus. Thirty years old. Has opinions.

name: Hide Armor
notes: Worn and repaired many times.

name: Simple Spear
notes: Hasn't used offensively in fifteen years. Carries from habit.

name: Grandmother's Compass
notes: Small carved disc of northern stone. Always points toward the nearest place her family has tended. Not magical in the traditional sense — very old and very attentive. Vrethka treats it with honest companionship.

name: Longbow +2 (Force)
effect: Deals force damage instead of piercing.
notes: 800g minus material trade discount.

name: Bracer of Steady Aim
effect: Advantage on concentration saving throws after taking damage.
notes: Both concentration and +1 hit bonus

name: Resonance Dampener
effect: Final component for Jaygar's fabrication project.

name: Ring of Spell Storing (5 levels)
effect: Holds up to 5 levels worth of spells. Any creature can cast a stored spell using the ring.

name: Ring of Spell Storing (3rd level)
effect: Holds one spell up to 3rd level. Releases on wearer's command.

name: Ring of Impact
effect: Stops a harsh impact once per day.

name: Leather Armor +2 (Southern)
effect: Light as cloth, southern make.
notes: AC 14 + DEX mod + 2.

name: Staff of Evocation
effect: Adds bonus damage to evocation spells.

name: Two Rubies
effect: For Helm of Brilliance reconstruction.

name: Concentration Robes
effect: Easier concentration checks — something in the weave.

name: Elemental Resistance Robes
effect: Resistance to one element, chosen on attunement.

name: Green Cloak of Presence
effect: Advantage on Persuasion and Performance checks. Once per day: hold a room.
notes: stat_bonuses are advantage not flat — handle in dnd_utils separately.

name: Grip Wrap +1
effect: +1 to hit with the wrapped weapon.
notes: In stock.

name: Bow Grip
effect: Reduces moving shot penalty. Fits longbow or recurve.

name: Bone Ring of Weapon Retention
effect: Cannot be disarmed.

name: Grip Wraps +1 (commissioned)
effect: +1 to hit with the wrapped weapon.
notes: Commissioned from Greyback claw materials. Ready in 4 days.

name: Ravine Stalker Crossbow (commissioned, at least 2-4 items)
effect: Exceptional force, quieter release than standard hand crossbow.
notes: Hand crossbow size. Built from Ravine Stalker jaw construction. Ready in 3 weeks.

name: Ceremonial Clan Collar
effect: To be dismantled for Helm of Brilliance reconstruction. Metal to be examined separately.
notes: Four opals, two spinels, one diamond. Exceptional dark metal of unknown origin. 800g.

name: Cloak Pin of Waterproofing
effect: Rain moves around the wearer.

name: Battle Spellbook
effect: Contains: Blight, Fire Shield, Ice Storm, Otiluke's Resilient Sphere, Cone of Cold, Destructive Wave, Immolation, Cloudkill.

name: Wand of Magic Missiles
effect: Cast Magic Missile using charges.

name: Belt of Constitution
effect: CON enhancement. Harder to kill.
notes: Abjuration. 400g. CON bonus amount not specified — update stat_bonuses or stat_overrides when known.

name: Cloak of the Manta Ray
effect: Breathe underwater. Swim speed 60.

name: Cloak of Elvenkind
effect: Advantage on Stealth checks outdoors. Color shifting.

name: Circlet of Blasting
effect: Cast Scorching Ray once per day.

name: Helmet of Proof
effect: Immunity to charm and fear.

name: Bracers of Spell Storing
effect: Holds spells up to 5th level.

name: Ring of Flexible Action
effect: Once per day: one action becomes a bonus action.

name: Amulet of Poison Immunity
effect: Complete immunity to poison while worn.

name: Cloak of Displacement
effect: Attackers have disadvantage on attack rolls until she takes damage each round.
notes: Rhuna already has one — confirm this is a second copy or update her entry.

name: Potion of Greater Healing
effect: Restores 4d4+4 HP.
notes: Well made, reliable.

name: Medallion of Concentration
effect: Advantage on all concentration checks.

name: Leather Armor of the Covenant
effect: Three properties: (1) Hit point maximum increased by 10 — permanent, not temporary. (2) Once per long rest: when the wearer drops to 0 HP, drop to 1 instead. (3) Advantage on saving throws against being charmed, frightened, or possessed.
flavor: As she puts it on, the vest-shape forms to fit her exactly and a shimmering dark blue set of sleeves and a sort of skirt-with-4-slits extends downward.
notes: hp_max bonus requires dnd_utils to add stat_bonuses.hp_max to character hp.max in resolution. Advantage on charm/fear/possession saves needs active_effects or separate handling — cannot be expressed as a flat stat_bonus.

name: The Weaver's Master-Awl
description: A simple ancient bone-handled leatherworking awl. The needle-point glows with a faint psionic violet hue. Hums with the collective tactical memories of 156 years when held.
effect: Four properties: (1) Psionic Reinforcement — Psychic Blades gain +2 to attack and damage rolls; Psi-Bolstered Knack successes do not expend the Psionic Energy die. (2) Tactical Foresight — Master of Tactics Help action targets two allies instead of one; each gains a bonus to their next saving throw equal to INT modifier. (3) Grandmaster's Stitch — during a long rest, touch leather armor or a leather item to infuse it for 24 hours: wearer gains resistance to Psychic damage and advantage on saves against Charmed and Frightened. (4) The Retired Special — once per day reaction when an ally is hit: pull them up to 15ft to an unoccupied space, potentially causing the attack to miss.
notes: Requires attunement by a Rogue.
